pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 3.0.1 to 3.3.2 to align with JDK 21 support.
Change packaging to 'pom' and remove direct dependencies to serve as a multi-module parent.
Define child modules for the multi-module monorepo structure.
Introduce dependencyManagement section to centralize version control for shared libraries.
Import Testcontainers BOM to manage test container dependency versions.
Manage version of internal common-library module in parent POM.
Add JavaFaker dependency for test data generation.
Add SpringDoc OpenAPI dependency for API documentation.
Configure maven-compiler-plugin to use Java 21 source and target levels.
Configure Lombok as an annotation processor path in the compiler plugin.
Update JaCoCo plugin version to 0.8.12 for compatibility.
Add Maven profiles to allow building specific subsets of modules.

.gitignore.general_idea: Removed obsolete Maven release plugin and build artifact patterns from the ignore list.
.gitignore.human_impl: Removed lines for target/, pom.xml.tag, pom.xml.releaseBackup, pom.xml.versionsBackup, pom.xml.next, release.properties, dependency-reduced-pom.xml, buildNumber.properties

.gitignore.general_idea: Added docker environment file to gitignore to prevent committing sensitive configuration.

.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.general_idea: The Maven distribution version was downgraded from 3.8.6 to 3.6.3 in the wrapper properties.
The Maven Wrapper JAR version was updated from 3.1.0 to 3.1.1.
Added the Apache License 2.0 header to the maven-wrapper.properties file.
.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.human_impl: # Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one...

README.md.general_idea: Update documentation to reflect the migration from Quarkus to Spring Boot 3.
README.md.human_impl: Changed title from 'Secure API Quarkus' to 'Secure API with Spring Boot 3' and updated dependency lists.

README.md.general_idea: Specify Java 21 as the required JDK version for the new Spring Boot 3 setup.
README.md.human_impl: Added 'Java JDK version 21 or higher' to the Requirements section.

README.md.general_idea: Document the new multi-module monorepo structure replacing the single-module layout.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced flat directory structure description with links to common-library and customer-service modules.

README.md.general_idea: Update build and run instructions to use Maven multi-module commands instead of Quarkus dev mode.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced './mvnw compile quarkus:dev' with './mvnw clean install -Pcustomer-service' and './mvnw -pl customer-service spring-boot:run'.

README.md.general_idea: Update instructions for starting external dependencies using a custom script instead of Quarkus-specific scripts.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced './start-keycloak.sh' with './task.sh services:up' for starting Keycloak and PostgreSQL.

README.md.general_idea: Update API testing instructions to use Swagger UI instead of Quarkus Dev UI.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced Quarkus Dev UI link with Swagger UI URL and added Keycloak authentication steps for Swagger.

README.md.general_idea: Remove Quarkus-specific native build and Kubernetes deployment instructions from the main README.
README.md.human_impl: Removed sections on 'Creating a native executable' and 'Deploying application to Kubernetes', pointing to sub-module READMEs instead.

README.md.general_idea: Add explicit documentation for default Keycloak and PostgreSQL credentials used in the new setup.
README.md.human_impl: Added section 'Admin password for Keycloak and PostgreSQL' with specific usernames and passwords.

mvnw.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper script to version 3.1.1 to align with newer Maven standards.
mvnw.human_impl: Changed header comment to 'version 3.1.1' and updated download URLs from 3.1.0 to 3.1.1.

mvnw.general_idea: Remove legacy M2_HOME environment variable logic as it is no longer required by modern Maven Wrapper.
mvnw.human_impl: Deleted blocks resolving M2_HOME, cygpath conversions for M2_HOME, and the -Dmaven.home JVM argument.

mvnw.general_idea: Correct the base directory resolution to use the script's location rather than the current working directory.
mvnw.human_impl: Changed find_maven_basedir input from "$(pwd)" to "$(dirname $0)" and improved path printing.

mvnw.general_idea: Suppress download output by default for wget and curl unless verbose mode is enabled.
mvnw.human_impl: Added QUIET variables (--quiet/--silent) to wget and curl commands, conditional on MVNW_VERBOSE.

mvnw.general_idea: Correct the fallback Java downloader to compile the source file instead of trying to compile a non-existent class file.
mvnw.human_impl: Renamed javaClass to javaSource for the .java file, added javaClass for .class, and updated javac invocation.

mvnw.general_idea: Update the Apache License URL from HTTPS to HTTP in the script header.

mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper script to version 3.1.1 to align with newer build tooling standards.
mvnw.cmd.human_impl: Changed version references from 3.1.0 to 3.1.1 in comments and download URLs.

mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Correct the variable name used for the wrapper download URL to ensure consistency with the property file key.
mvnw.cmd.human_impl: Renamed DOWNLOAD_URL to WRAPPER_URL to match the 'wrapperUrl' property key.

mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Ensure the Maven wrapper script is executable on Unix-like systems.
